=== 506444 ===
### 506444 | res=2026-03-15 | string (team name)
Q: Which team will beat South Korea to reach the 2026 AFC Women’s Asian Cup final by March 18, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-14. Australia and South Korea are set to play the other semifinal in the AFC Women’s Asian Cup. The winner of that match will move on to the final.
RC: The primary source will be the official AFC Women’s Asian Cup match report, results page, or match centre for the semifinal match between the two teams. If needed, a contemporaneous report from a major wire service may be used only to confirm the same official result. This question resolves on 18th March 2026, when the semifinal result is officially published after the match. Provide the official short team name of the nation that advances from the semifinal, exactly as listed by the competition organizer.
  PRED: {'Australia': 0.45, 'North Korea': 0.06}
=== 529060 ===
### 529060 | res=2026-03-15 | string (weapon name)
Q: What missile type will Ukrainian intelligence say it destroyed before launch during Russia’s record 24-hour air attack in late March 2026, as confirmed by March 31, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-14. Russia is continuing large drone-and-missile attacks against Ukrainian targets, while Ukraine is trying to disrupt launch systems and defend its cities. Different missile families are used in these attacks, and some are especially notable because of their speed or role.
RC: This question resolves based on official Ukrainian military or intelligence statements identifying the missile type, corroborated by major reporting outlets. The question resolves no later than 31 March 2026, or earlier once the missile type is publicly named without ambiguity. Provide the missile family or model name only, in 1-3 words, without extra descriptive text.
  PRED: {'Iskander': 0.25, 'Kinzhal': 0.2, 'Kalibr': 0.12, 'Kh-101': 0.1, 'Oreshnik': 0.06}
